title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIOS OF LIDONG, TABA-TABA, MANMONTOY, BORABOD, TAISAN, HINAMPACAN, MANLIMONSITO, POLANTUNA, AND OLIVA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BASUD, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, INTO BARÂ­RIOS OF SAID MUNICIPALITY WITH THE SAME NAMES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2936 / 51 OG No. 7, 3391 (July, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1317, June 16, 1955 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIOS OF LIDONG, TABA-TABA, MANMONTOY, BORABOD, TAISAN, HINAMPACAN, MANLIMONSITO, POLANTUNA, AND OLIVA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BASUD, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, INTO BARÂRIOS OF SAID MUNICIPALITY WITH THE SAME NAMES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Lidong, Taba-Taba, Manmontoy, Borabod, Taisan, Hinampacan, Manlimonsito, Polantuna, and Oliva in the Municipality of Basud, Province of CamaÂrines Norte, are converted into barrios of said municipality with the same names.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1955.
